text: **Anna:** Hello!
**Anna:** In Washington DC, there are many {things|物事/出来事|/θɪŋz/|Many things happened today.} to do on a Sunday afternoon

**Anna:** But today I feel {bored|退屈な|/bɔːrd/|I am bored at home.}
